creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #2)
> To clarify, do I need to go back to drm-legacy or is testing with drm-stable, shich I now run, OK.

Both if possible. drm-stable-kmod has more users and is based on more recent Linux kernel, so less likely to regress.

> As to the patch, I am assuming that you refer to D16571.

Correct.
